category_title: Relationship-dependent students sensitive to teacher attitude
scenario_title: Learning Greek mythology in language arts
minimal_context: John is in language arts class working on an assignment about Greek mythology.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Today in language arts, we are going to learn about Greek mythology. The goal is just to expose you to it.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Because quite frankly, many things in language arts I really don’t really care about.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's just focus on the reading for now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I could have done without Greek mythology unless I really planned on getting on Jeopardy.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just try your best to get through the material.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: There’s a lot of things that you don’t really necessarily need in life they just say that they want to expose you to it. I have trouble learning from that and don't enjoy it, and that can be quite stressful in school.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Today in language arts, we are going to learn about Greek mythology. The goal is just to expose you to it.

STUDENT: Because quite frankly, many things in language arts I really don’t really care about.

TUTOR: Let's just focus on the reading for now.

STUDENT: I could have done without Greek mythology unless I really planned on getting on Jeopardy.

TUTOR: Just try your best to get through the material.

STUDENT: There’s a lot of things that you don’t really necessarily need in life they just say that they want to expose you to it. I have trouble learning from that and don't enjoy it, and that can be quite stressful in school.

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: when presented with material that has a lack of relevance and that you don't really necessarily need in life
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: hindered his ability to learn the material
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: caused him distress, felt it was pointless, did not care about it
related_quotes: I could have done without Greek mythology unless I really planned on getting on Jeopardy
that can be quite stressful in school.

behavior_patterns.condition: if you have trouble learning from that and uh, don't really enjoy learning about it
related_quotes: there’s a lot of things that you don’t really necessarily need in life they just say that they want to expose you to it
